items.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Becomes Sector Gamma AS’s 6th-Largest Holding
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is among the best stocks to buy now according to AI. According to the recent disclosure with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Sector Gamma AS has increased its position in Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) by 25.6% in the first quarter.
